text:
First, note that time zones as we know them did not exist in 1567, but for the purpose of this exercise, we will use modern time zone offsets.

Asia/Kolkata (India) is UTC+5:30.
US/Hawaii is UTC-10:00.

The difference between them is:
UTC+5:30 to UTC = -5:30
UTC to UTC-10:00 = -10:00
Total difference = -15:30.

So, Hawaii time = 4:00 - 15:30.

4:00 - 15:30 = (4:00 - 15 hours) - 30 minutes = (4 - 15) hours - 30 minutes = -11 hours - 30 minutes.

-11:30 + 24 hours = 12:30 (previous day).

Thus, in Hawaii it is 12:30 PM on February 15, 1567.

FINAL_ANSWER: 1567-02-15 12:30
